_comment: Config for the markdown-link-check CI gate (docs link-checker, #135). Scope is root *.md + docs/**. External http(s) URLs are intentionally NOT checked: the repository is private, so every canonical github.com/nightgauge/* URL 404s to an unauthenticated checker (revisit when the repo goes public, #63). Image assets are skipped: this gate validates cross-document reference integrity, not binary asset presence, and some operator-runbook screenshots are committed in follow-up PRs (see docs/images/*/README.md). Pure in-page #anchors are not resolved as files.
